https://hg.mozilla.org/mozilla-central/r.commit_message:
Bug 1745734 - Fix styling of insecure warning. r=desktop-theme-reviewers,dao

--grey-60 doesn't exist in browser chrome, so `color` behaves as
currentColor, and `fill` as `initial` which is black.

Without this rule fill is already currentColor due to the general
.ac-site-icon rules.

Differential Revision: https://phabricator.services.mozilla.com/D230234
